summary: Generate derived (non-seed) idea nodes for an idea campaign from research-progress evidence deltas and import them through the engine's node.import_generated RPC as an auditable generation pack. V0 operator: LiteratureMining over a deep survey's tensions and re-anchored gaps (FailureRouting when a failed-approach ledger exists). Retrieval-first by construction (no retrieval receipt, no evidence URI), one candidate per structurally distinct anchor, mechanical dedup against every campaign node, novelty as a falsifiable closest-prior delta claim — zero generator-side scoring; nodes face the same idea-posterior admission gate as seeds.

install.claude_code: Link into ~/.claude/skills or install via marketplace when available.
install.codex: Link into ~/.codex/skills for Codex native discovery.
